intent: Can we use some results from expert powered prediction to make a distribution-free version of our streaming temperature estimator? With guarentees about its performance? Since the experts are part of the same "temperature-parameterized" family, I'm hoping that there's a way to make this work. Use web search. Enter plan mode to explain your findings before editing anything.
